title: the hiker
description: the hiker, a scary mod that adds a new boss named the hiker, it also add a new biome, the hikers forest. and different variants of the hiker!
body:
- what does this mod add?

  the hiker, a scary mod that adds a new boss named the hiker, it also add a new biome, the     hikers forest.


- why sould i download this mod?

  it over all just makes the game more fun, scary, hard, and challenging!


- what variants does the hiker have?

  it has 4 variants, normal, glitched, corrpted, creppy.


- what blocks does it add?

  blood block, bloody grass, bloody dirt, bloody podzol, bloody stone, bloodydeepslate,
  deadstone, bloody glass, glitched block, glitched ore, blood ore and much more!


- what version is it? 

  forge 1.20.1 only.


- what items does it add?

  beat red heart, black diamond, red diamond, glitched diamond, blood item, death star,
  black rod, raw bloodstone, glitched diamond, gun, glitched star, glitched rod, iron rod,     shotgun, bullet and much more!


- what tools does it add?

  blood sword, glitched sword, corrpted sword, blood pickaxe, glitched pickaxe,
  corrpted pickaxe, the hikers ski, gun.


- what music discs does it add?

  screaming death, glitched disc.


- what biomes does it add?

  the hikers forest, the hikers home, the glitched forest.


- what structures does it add? 

  red camp, blue camp, green camp.


- what armor does it add?

  blood armor.


- what mods goes good with the hiker mod?

  would recommed pairing with spookomerty or insanity shader, ambient sounds, dynamic lights,       and sounds.
